pain.title: Before Shift Chat… WhatsApp drains your time
pain.desc: Scattered chats, slow replies, poor visibility, and no sales system.

c1.d: Leads come in… but you can't track ownership or outcomes.

c2.d: No routing, roles, or performance tracking.

c3.d: Slow replies = lost revenue. Customers want instant answers.

ai.title: AI that doesn't just reply… it sells
ai.desc: Shift Chat adds an AI layer on top of WhatsApp: auto replies, lead qualification, smart suggestions for agents, and conversion-ready chat flows.
ai.li2: Lead qualification before the agent jumps in

features.title: Core Features
features.desc: Everything you need to turn WhatsApp into an organized business system.

f1.d: A unified inbox for the whole team.

f3.d: Track speed, ownership, and outcomes per agent.

f4.d: Admin and Agent roles with full control.

f5.d: Go live quickly with a clean setup.

ba.title: Before / After Shift Chat
ba.desc: A clear difference in structure, speed, and conversion.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.desc: Choose a plan — we'll finalize everything on WhatsApp.

trial.title: 1-Week Demo Trial

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes, you can add multiple agents and manage permissions from the admin account.

final.title: Ready to turn WhatsApp into a smart sales engine?
